summary: Updated Hierarchical Security Model v2 testing completed. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All critical features verified. Changes validated: (1) Cashier level now 30 (was 20), (2) Admin (level 100) now sees ALL users including themselves, (3) DELETE user has hierarchy protection, (4) Audit logs working. Admin sees 6 users in settings including themselves.

backend: test_luis_login_returns_level_30 - Luis (Cajero) login returns role_level: 30 (CHANGED from 20)
test_admin_sees_all_6_users_including_self - Admin sees ALL users including themselves (NEW BEHAVIOR)
test_carlos_sees_only_chef_pedro - Carlos (level 20) only sees Chef Pedro (level 10)
test_luis_sees_meseros_and_kitchen - Luis (level 30) sees Carlos, Maria (20), Chef Pedro (10) - NOT Admin or self
test_carlos_cannot_delete_user_same_level_or_higher - Carlos cannot delete users with level >= 20
test_admin_can_delete_lower_level_user - Admin can delete users with lower level
test_admin_cannot_delete_themselves - Admin gets 403 when trying to delete themselves
test_audit_logs_exist - Audit logs endpoint accessible and returns data
frontend: Admin Settings page shows ALL 6 users including themselves: Admin, Carlos, Maria, Luis, Chef Pedro
Admin UserConfig shows permissions grid (PERMISOS DE MESERO section)
Admin role selector shows level indicators: N100, N30, N20, N40, N10, N80, N60

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_hierarchical_security_v2.py - Created new test suite for updated security model
seed_data_creation: None - used existing users from seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hierarchical security model v2 tested. Key changes from v1: (1) Cashier level changed from 20 to 30, (2) Level 100 now sees ALL users including self, (3) DELETE /api/users has hierarchy protection. BUILTIN_ROLE_LEVELS: admin=100, supervisor=40, cashier=30, waiter=20, kitchen=10. Level 80 (Propietario) and Level 60 (Gerente) are custom roles. Level 40 and below have no access to Config (managed by frontend isSystemAdmin check >= 100).
